introText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Fresno, The Azizi Firm is here to help. As the largest city in the Central Valley, Fresno's major highways and agricultural traffic create serious risks for drivers. We represent victims of auto accidents, truck accidents, motorcycle accidents, and rideshare accidents. Our experienced car accident attorneys fight to get you maximum compensation for medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and all other damages.

sections.header: Types of Car Accident Cases We Handle
sections.body: Our Fresno car accident lawyers handle all types of motor vehicle accidents: rear-end collisions at stoplights on major thoroughfares, T-bone accidents, head-on collisions on rural highways, hit and run accidents, drunk driving accidents, distracted driving accidents, rideshare (Uber/Lyft) accidents, truck accidents involving agricultural haulers, motorcycle accidents, pedestrian accidents, and accidents involving farm equipment on public roads.

sections.header: Common Causes of Car Accidents in Fresno
sections.body: Fresno has California's highest rate of fatal car accidents per capita according to some studies. Major causes include high-speed collisions on SR-99 and SR-41, drunk driving, distracted driving on long straight roads, fatigued agricultural workers driving after long shifts, heavy truck traffic on SR-99, dense fog in winter months reducing visibility, and dangerous intersections on Shaw Avenue and Blackstone Avenue. Our attorneys investigate every accident to identify all liable parties.

faq.question: What should I do after a car accident in Fresno?
faq.answer: Call 911, seek medical attention, document the scene thoroughly including weather conditions (especially if fog was a factor), exchange information with other drivers, get witness contacts, and contact a car accident lawyer before speaking with insurance companies.

faq.question: How much is my Fresno car accident case worth?
faq.answer: Case value depends on injury severity, medical costs, lost wages, pain and suffering, long-term rehabilitation needs, and available insurance coverage. Fresno County juries are known for being conservative, so strong case preparation is essential. We offer free case evaluations.

whyHireText: Our founder previously defended major insurance companies, giving us insider knowledge of how they evaluate and settle claims. We understand the unique challenges of litigating in the Central Valley and know how to present your case effectively to Fresno County juries.
contactUsText: If you've been injured in a car accident in Fresno, contact The Azizi Firm today for a free, confidential consultation. No fees unless we win.
